历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8985 → 7797 → 7947 → 6885 → 5798, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3187 positions in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5798, a forward shift of about 1087 positions compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for Physics Category: 33 in 2021 → 38 in 2022 → 37 in 2023 → 41 in 2024 → 42 in 2025 → 41 in 2026, with a slight reduction of 1 student (-2.4%) in 2026 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, with a continuously improving ranking, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 positions in ranking), but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating above-average application attention; Aquatic Products A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting applicants to related majors; popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, though not rated A-class, benefit from industry popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated Physics Category of about 79,970, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, a developed coastal city, with some regional appeal to Jilin candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.05%, making it a smaller-scale 985 university for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the rising university ranking, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 5798, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5695, and a range of 5195–6195.
